Yue Man Square is for hosting the Community Exhibition of UCH 50th Anniversary on the Mid-Nov. User suggested that hosting the Community Exhibition in Kwun Tong, due to it is convenient to progress event nearby UCH.

In consideration of the venues in Kwun Tong, APM and Yue Man Square was proposed as they fully complied with the requirements which are the location, transportation, and facility of venues. Therefore, user has been sent the event proposal to both suppliers to invite them to quote for the rental services of venues. 

However, user informed us that they still do not receive the reply from APM until this moment. In view of that the event will be hosted in a short time, Yue Man Square Company Limited is available to rental the venue for hosting the Community Exhibition of UCH 50th Anniversary, a single quotation invitation is thus recommendation.

Yue Man Square has been selected as the venue to host the Community Exhibition for the UCH 50th Anniversary in mid-November. However, considering convenience and proximity to UCH, it was suggested to host the exhibition in Kwun Tong instead.

After evaluating various venues in Kwun Tong, APM and Yue Man Square were identified as suitable options that meet the requirements in terms of location, transportation, and facilities. The event proposal has been sent to both suppliers to request quotations for the rental services of their venues.

Unfortunately, user has not yet received a response from APM at this time. As the event is approaching rapidly, Yue Man Square Company Limited is available to provide the venue for hosting the Community Exhibition of UCH 50th Anniversary. Therefore, it is recommended to proceed with a single quotation invitation from Yue Man Square Company Limited.

The text you provided appears to be correct grammatically. However, there are a few points where you could improve the clarity and coherence of the sentences. Here is a revised version of the text:

"UCH will be hosting the Community Exhibition for its 50th Anniversary in mid-November. The user from UCH CIVSD suggested holding the exhibition in Kwun Tong due to its convenient proximity to UCH.

After considering various venues in Kwun Tong, we have identified APM and Yue Man Square as suitable options that meet the requirements of UCH CIVSD in terms of location, transportation, and facilities. We have sent the event proposal to both suppliers, requesting quotations for the rental services of their venues.

However, we have not yet received a response from APM. As the event is rapidly approaching, we propose that Yue Man Square Company Limited be considered as an alternative venue for hosting the Community Exhibition of UCH's 50th Anniversary. Therefore, we recommend proceeding with a single quotation invitation from Yue Man Square Company Limited."

In view of the event is rapidly approaching, Yue Man Square Company Limited is the sole provider of an available venue for hosting the Community Exhibition of UCH’s 50th Anniversary in Kwun Tong, a single quotation invitation is thus recommendation.

Considering the rapidly approaching event, Yue Man Square Company Limited is the only available venue provider for hosting the Community Exhibition of UCH's 50th Anniversary in Kwun Tong. Therefore, we recommend proceeding with a single quotation invitation to Yue Man Square Company Limited.
